arts.ttl: Germany vs Italy 3-3: Azzurri Wake Up in Second Half to Cancel Three-Goal Deficit
arts.sum: A question from Dortmund: Which one is the real Italy? The frightened, confused lineup that was brutally wiped out by Germany in the first half at the Signal Iduna Park tonight? Or the brave, gritty side that canceled a three-goal deficit and even went close to wrap a sensational comeback? The second leg of the Nations League Quarter Final between Germany and Italy ended 3-3 and was a textbook game of two halves. The post Germany vs Italy 3-3: Azzurri Wake Up in Second Half to Cancel Three-Goal Deficit appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.ttl: Italy Player Ratings vs Germany: Azzurri Exit Nations League with Heads Held High
arts.sum: The Azzurri managed to pull off a sensational comeback away from home to level the score on the night, but it wasn't enough to overturn the script. So here are our player ratings for Italy who secured a 3-3 draw against Germany but still lost 4-5 on aggregate. The post Italy Player Ratings vs Germany: Azzurri Exit Nations League with Heads Held High appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.ttl: Germany squander 3-goal lead, still sneak by Italy
arts.sum: Germany squandered a three-goal lead to draw 3-3 against Italy on Sunday to earn a nerve-racking 5-4 aggregate victory and a spot in the Nations League last four.

arts.ttl: Punished for arguing! Italy concede bizarre goal, Ronaldo nets for Portugal
arts.sum: Italy conceded an embarrassing goal in their 3-3 Nations League quarter-final second-leg draw to Germany as the Azzurri were caught napping at a corner.

arts.ttl: Germany 3-3 Italy: Highlights, man of the match, stats as Joshua Kimmich, Julian Naglesmann scrape through in Nations League
arts.sum: Julian Nagelsmann's Germany progressed to the semi-final of the Nations League on Sunday night after a dramatic clash with Luciano Spalletti's Italy at Signal Iduna Park.

arts.ttl: Kean: ‘Important Italy showed a different attitude’
arts.sum: Moise Kean bagged a brace to spark the Italy comeback from 3-0 down to hold...

arts.ttl: Germany holds off Italy to reach Nations League semifinals as other quarterfinals go to extra time
arts.sum: Germany scored three first-half goals against Italy but then held on grimly for a 3-3 draw to reach the Nations League semifinals on Sunday. Giacomo Raspadori’s penalty deep into second-half stoppage time put Italy within one goal of forcing extra time in Dortmund, but Germany just secured a 5-4 aggregate win.

arts.ttl: Italy start 2026 World Cup qualifying in Norway on June 6
arts.sum: Italy’s Nations League exit to Germany means they will enter the 2026 World Cup qualifying...
